text:
Created attachment 230714
sysutils/node_exporter: Update to v1.3.1

This patch updates sysutils/node_exporter to v1.3.1.

Changelogs can be found at:
  - https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/tag/v1.3.0
  - https://github.com/prometheus/node_exporter/releases/tag/v1.3.1

-David
